name: gpd-verification
description: GPD physics verification checks. Tools for running contract-aware checks, dimensional analysis, domain and bundle-specific checklists, limiting case checks, symmetry verification, and coverage gap analysis. Contract-aware request surfaces are closed and schema-driven. The full contract payload rules live on the `contract` input schema. Proof-oriented checks still require an authoritative contract payload. Missing grounding, evidence, or proof artifacts stay explicit and must not be invented. Use `suggest_contract_checks(...)` to surface the exact per-check request metadata before calling `run_contract_check(...)`.
prerequisites: Install GPD before enabling built-in MCP servers.

python_module.notes: Replace `${GPD_PYTHON}` with a Python >=3.11 interpreter that has GPD installed.
